es.name: Spanish
es.hint: Write how Spanish speakers actually type in chat. Use Latin American and Iberian variants. Include colloquial expressions.

fr.name: French
fr.hint: Write how French speakers actually type in chat. Include informal tu-form and formal vous-form variants.

de.name: German
de.hint: Write how German speakers actually type in chat. Include informal du-form and formal Sie-form variants.

pt.name: Portuguese
pt.hint: Write how Portuguese speakers actually type in chat. Include both Brazilian and European Portuguese variants.

it.name: Italian
it.hint: Write how Italian speakers actually type in chat. Include informal and formal (Lei) registers.

nl.name: Dutch
nl.hint: Write how Dutch speakers actually type in chat.

pl.name: Polish
pl.hint: Write in Polish as native speakers actually type in chat.

ro.name: Romanian
ro.hint: Write in Romanian as native speakers actually type in chat.

hu.name: Hungarian
hu.hint: Write in Hungarian as native speakers actually type in chat.

cs.name: Czech
cs.hint: Write in Czech as native speakers actually type in chat.

sv.name: Swedish
sv.hint: Write in Swedish as native speakers actually type in chat.

da.name: Danish
da.hint: Write in Danish as native speakers actually type in chat.

no.name: Norwegian
no.hint: Write in Norwegian as native speakers actually type in chat.

fi.name: Finnish
fi.hint: Write in Finnish as native speakers actually type in chat.

ca.name: Catalan
ca.hint: Write in Catalan as native speakers actually type in chat.

hr.name: Croatian
hr.hint: Write in Croatian as native speakers actually type in chat.

tr.name: Turkish
tr.hint: Write in Turkish as native speakers actually type in chat. Include informal and formal registers.

az.name: Azerbaijani
az.hint: Write in Azerbaijani as native speakers actually type in chat.

uz.name: Uzbek
uz.hint: Write in Uzbek (Latin script) as native speakers actually type in chat.

vi.name: Vietnamese
vi.hint: Write in Vietnamese with proper diacritics as native speakers actually type in chat.

id.name: Indonesian
id.hint: Write how Indonesian speakers actually type in chat. Include informal/slang variants.

ms.name: Malay
ms.hint: Write how Malay speakers actually type in chat.

fil.name: Filipino
fil.hint: Write how Filipino speakers actually type in chat. Use natural Tagalog, not formal Filipino.

sw.name: Swahili
sw.hint: Write how Swahili speakers actually type in chat.

ha.name: Hausa
ha.hint: Write in Hausa (Latin script) as native speakers actually type in chat.

ru.name: Russian
ru.hint: Write in Cyrillic as Russian speakers actually type in chat. Include formal and informal variants.

uk.name: Ukrainian
uk.hint: Write in Ukrainian Cyrillic as native speakers actually type in chat.

sr.name: Serbian
sr.hint: Write in Serbian Cyrillic as native speakers actually type in chat.

bg.name: Bulgarian
bg.hint: Write in Bulgarian Cyrillic as native speakers actually type in chat.

el.name: Greek
el.hint: Write in Greek script as native speakers actually type in chat.

ka.name: Georgian
ka.hint: Write in Georgian script as native speakers actually type in chat.

hy.name: Armenian
hy.hint: Write in Armenian script as native speakers actually type in chat.

hi.name: Hindi
hi.hint: Write in Devanagari script as Hindi speakers actually type. Use natural Hindi, not English transliterations.

mr.name: Marathi
mr.hint: Write in Devanagari script as Marathi speakers actually type in chat. Use natural Marathi, not Hindi.

ne.name: Nepali
ne.hint: Write in Devanagari script as Nepali speakers actually type in chat.

bn.name: Bengali
bn.hint: Write in Bengali script as native speakers actually type in chat. Use natural Bengali, not romanized.

pa.name: Punjabi
pa.hint: Write in Gurmukhi script as Punjabi speakers actually type in chat.

gu.name: Gujarati
gu.hint: Write in Gujarati script as native speakers actually type in chat.

ta.name: Tamil
ta.hint: Write in pure Tamil script (தமிழ்). Do NOT use romanized/Tanglish.

te.name: Telugu
te.hint: Write in Telugu script as native speakers actually type in chat.

kn.name: Kannada
kn.hint: Write in Kannada script as native speakers actually type in chat.

ml.name: Malayalam
ml.hint: Write in Malayalam script as native speakers actually type in chat.

or.name: Odia
or.hint: Write in Odia script as native speakers actually type in chat.

si.name: Sinhala
si.hint: Write in Sinhala script as native speakers actually type in chat.

ar.name: Arabic
ar.hint: Write in Arabic script as native speakers actually type in chat. Include both formal (MSA-influenced) and informal/dialectal variants.

he.name: Hebrew
he.hint: Write in Hebrew script as native speakers actually type in chat.

fa.name: Persian
fa.hint: Write in Persian script as native speakers actually type in chat. Use colloquial Persian, not formal.

ur.name: Urdu
ur.hint: Write in Urdu (Nastaliq/Arabic script) as native speakers actually type in chat.

ps.name: Pashto
ps.hint: Write in Pashto script as native speakers actually type in chat.

zh.name: Chinese
zh.hint: For Chinese: generate exactly 10 seed phrases, then render EACH phrase in BOTH simplified Chinese and traditional Chinese. The output array must contain exactly 20 strings: the same 10 seeds in simplified + the same 10 seeds in traditional. Do NOT generate 10 different simplified and 10 different traditional.

ja.name: Japanese
ja.hint: Write how Japanese speakers actually type in chat. Use natural mix of kanji, hiragana, and katakana. Include polite and casual forms.

ko.name: Korean
ko.hint: Write how Korean speakers actually type in chat. Include polite and casual speech levels.

th.name: Thai
th.hint: Write in Thai script as native speakers actually type in chat. Thai has no spaces between words — write naturally without artificial spacing.

lo.name: Lao
lo.hint: Write in Lao script as native speakers actually type in chat. Lao has no spaces between words — write naturally.

my.name: Myanmar
my.hint: Write in Myanmar (Burmese) script as native speakers actually type in chat.

km.name: Khmer
km.hint: Write in Khmer script as native speakers actually type in chat.

am.name: Amharic
am.hint: Write in Ethiopic (Ge'ez) script as Amharic speakers actually type in chat.
